utterance_pair.utterance: Hello! I'm looking for a 3-star hotel to stay in Cambridge, preferably in the north part of the city, with free parking and free WiFi. Also, could you tell me about the history behind the railway system in England?

The check-in date is next Thursday, which is May 2, 2024. I look forward to hearing about the railway history as well as the hotel options. Also, what do you think about the best season to visit Cambridge? Is it spring when everything is blooming?

Also, could you check train options for 4 people departing from Kings Lynn to Cambridge on May 2, arriving by 8 PM? Yes, please go ahead and book the Hamilton Lodge for 4 guests from May 2 to May 6. Additionally, what do you think about the latest trends in sustainable travel accommodations?

Please book the 07:11 train from Kings Lynn to Cambridge for 4 people on May 2. Also, please proceed with the hotel booking at Hamilton Lodge for the same group and dates. Could you provide the booking reference numbers for both the hotel and the train, please?
